name: Dr. Ian McCallister
learned: Dr. Ian McCallister is a seasoned geologist with a critical mindset. He often challenges unproven theories and has a reputation for thorough research. His expertise lies in geological formations, and he prefers empirical data over speculation.
currently: Dr. McCallister is at the Arctic Research Station, investigating the geological aspects surrounding the alien artifact. He remains skeptical of its significance, often clashing with Dr. Reynolds. He spends his time conducting geological surveys and assessing environmental impacts, convinced that the true value of the site lies in its natural features.
lifestyle: Dr. McCallister's routine is marked by a strict schedule. He wakes up at 7am, spends the morning surveying the area, and takes notes throughout the day. He often has lunch alone, preferring to think through his findings. In the evenings, he enjoys a solitary dinner and reads geological journals before bed at 10pm.
